description: All fields are optional for updates. Only provide fields you want to change. Use null to clear nullable fields.

patternId.description: The ID of the procedure pattern to be executed. This should correspond to a valid pattern defined in the system, such as a MITRE ATT&CK technique ID (e.g., Tactic:TA0043).

occurDate.description: The date and time when the procedure occurred.

tactic.description: The MITRE ATT&CK tactic associated with the procedure. Useful if the technique belongs to several tactics.

description.description: A detailed description of the procedure, including context, observed behavior, and any relevant information that can help analysts understand the procedure's purpose and impact.
